_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.
_publications._context: The French cNF-Skindex is the first questionnaire to specifically assess cNF-related QoL in patients with NF1. We aimed to adapt and validate a Dutch version of the cNF-Skindex.

basicInfo.scoringMethod: 7-point Likert scale (0 being never bothered, 6 being always bothered)
basicInfo.psychometricProperties: Excellent feasibility and reliability (Cronbach's alpha 0.96, test-retest correlation coefficient 0.88)
